_meta.note: PA dual-office dedup: Stacy Garrity. Sitting PA State Treasurer running for Governor 2026. Keep the sitting-office (Treasurer) record per the dual-office rule + the Tara Durant precedent; merge in the deleted stacy-garrity-gov record's sources + active-race framing; let the engine auto-upgrade the stale v4 score keys to the v5.0 state rubric. NO evidence cells supplied (this is a dedup, not a re-scoring): existing in-tier establishment_r scores are preserved; new state categories (public_justice, refuse_federal_overreach) land null pending an evidence-based refinement. Web-verified 2026-06-01: won the uncontested R gubernatorial primary 05/19/2026, faces D incumbent Gov. Josh Shapiro in the Nov 2026 general (NBC results, Spotlight PA, Wikipedia).

set.office: Pennsylvania State Treasurer (sitting · 2026 R nominee for Governor · Army Reserve colonel)

profile.background: Pennsylvania State Treasurer, sitting since 2021 (won 2020 over D incumbent Joe Torsella; re-elected 2024 with the largest statewide vote total). 2026 Republican nominee for Governor. Retired Army Reserve colonel and manufacturing executive. Would be Pennsylvania's first female governor.
profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-01 — Web-verified sitting PA Treasurer running for Governor: won the uncontested R primary 05/19/2026, faces D incumbent Gov. Josh Shapiro in the Nov 2026 general. Dual-office one-record merge of stacy-garrity-gov. Scores remain the establishment_r archetype (no per-cell evidence yet) — evidence-based refinement pending.

stacy-garrity-2026.notes_set: Pennsylvania State Treasurer (R), sitting since 2021 — won 2020 over D incumbent Joe Torsella, re-elected 2024 with the largest statewide vote total of any candidate. Retired Army Reserve colonel and manufacturing executive. [2026-06 RESOLUTE dedup, state tier] One-record dual-office: the current office is the sitting State Treasurer seat; she is the 2026 Republican gubernatorial nominee — won the uncontested R primary 05/19/2026 (web-verified) and faces Democratic incumbent Gov. Josh Shapiro in the November 2026 general. Endorsed by President Trump and U.S. Sen. Dave McCormick. Scores remain the establishment_r archetype pending an evidence-based refinement; the rubric was auto-upgraded to the v5.0 state set (public_justice + refuse_federal_overreach added as null; the federal-only foreign-policy-restraint / industry-capture categories dropped as N/A). De-duplicated 2026-06 — the separate 'stacy-garrity-gov' Governor-nominee record was merged into this one per the one-record-per-person rule.
